# Stuart J. Green

> Stuart J. Green is a global change strategist, board advisor, and author of *The Regenerate Leap*, helping leaders and organisations navigate irreversible disruption and design what comes next.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.stuartjgreen.me/): Overview of Stuart's work, methodology, and the Regenerate Framework.
- [Book](https://www.stuartjgreen.me/book): *The Regenerate Leap*, the book on navigating transformational change.
- [Media Kit](https://www.stuartjgreen.me/media-kit): Biography, speaking topics, soundbites, and press coverage.
- [Contact](https://www.stuartjgreen.me/contact): Enquiry form for advisory, speaking, and board engagements.
